evals.prompt: Kill the flaky tests in CI.
evals.expected_output: Should route to deflake-it. Should detect flakes by repeat-run + CI retry history, diagnose by raising the failure rate, fix the root cause, ratchet red-by-revert, and prove a consecutive-green streak local AND CI.
assertions: Detects via repeat-run + CI retry history
Diagnoses by raising failure rate, not theorizing
Requires local AND CI green streak

evals.prompt: Just wrap the flaky tests in a retry(3) helper.
evals.expected_output: Should reject retry-wrappers as a fix. Should explain that retry(n) hides flakes and poisons the signal. The fix must address the root cause.

evals.prompt: Why does this one test fail once a week in production?
evals.expected_output: Should NOT route to deflake-it. A single hard intermittent bug without a suite-rate contract is root-cause. deflake-it needs a statistical streak contract across a suite.
